def positive_prompt_template_string_concat_in_loop():
    rule_id = "prompt_template_string_concat_in_loop"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Prompt strings are built incrementally inside loops instead of composing a stable template once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
